repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
titles_tesim: Liturgiarium sive Euchologium glagoliticum secundum (olim Missale)
contents_tesim: Liturgiarium sive Euchologium glagoliticum secundum (olim Missale)
full_text_tesim: Decorative bars in black, red and blue | Two round ornaments with inscriptions on ff. 13r and 20v, the first completely faded out, the latter with remnants of colouring (brownish red, black, blue)
Folios and fragmented folios, some very small | Small piece in Envelope 1 with majuscule Greek writing was originally inserted between ff. 18v and 19r
Initials in black, blue, and red
Liturgiarium sive Euchologium glagoliticum secundum (olim Missale)

Manuscript fragments contained in 9 envelopes: 6 with small fragments, 3 are empty (kept for documentation purposes). Envelope 1 contains remains of binding; envelope 2 contains 11 unnumbered fragments; Envelope 3 contains 9 large, unfoliated fragments and a number of small fragments; envelope 4 contains folios numbered 8, 9, 12, 13, 16-21, 23-25; envelope 5 contains 16 folios, unnumbered; envelope 6 contains folios numbered 27-64, 66, 68. Total number of foliated and unfoliated folios is 86, as of February 2015

Pencil foliation does not necessarily represent original sequence; there is only partial correspondence between the sequence of images, the pencil foliation on individual rectos and versos, and Miklas 2000
Poorly legible overtext, some erasures due to scraping or washing
